SELECT now() AS x, toDate(x);
CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_date DateTime);
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (now()), (toDateTime('2022-12-31 23:59:59')), (toDateTime('2023-01-01 00:00:00'));
SELECT toDate(event_date) AS date_only FROM test_dates;
SELECT toDate('2023-12-31 12:34:56') AS x, toTypeName(x);
SELECT toDate('2023-12-31') AS x, toTypeName(x);
SELECT toDate(12345) AS x, toTypeName(x);
SELECT toDate(10000000000.) AS x, toTypeName(x);
SELECT now() AS current_time, toDate(current_time) AS date_converted FROM test_dates;
SELECT toDate(toUnixTimestamp('2020-01-01 00:00:00')) AS unix_to_date;
SELECT ts, toDate(ts) AS date_interpretation FROM (SELECT toUnixTimestamp(now()) AS ts);
SELECT toDate(123) AS days_since_epoch, DATE_ADD('1970-01-01', INTERVAL 123 DAY) AS add_method;
CREATE TABLE timezone_test (timestamp DateTime);
INSERT INTO timezone_test VALUES (now()), (toDateTime('2022-12-30 13:01:00'));
SELECT toDate(timestamp) AS date_utc, toDate(timestamp, 'Europe/Berlin') AS date_berlin FROM timezone_test;
CREATE TABLE multi_table_test (event_id UInt32, event_date DateTime);
SELECT event_id, toDate(event_date) AS event_date_only FROM multi_table_test WHERE event_id IN (SELECT event_id FROM multi_table_test WHERE event_id = 1);
WITH (SELECT toDate(now())) AS current_date SELECT current_date AS today, toDate('2023-01-01 12:30:30') AS new_year_date;
SELECT x, toDate(x) AS truncated_date FROM (SELECT timestamp, toDateTime('2022-01-01 14:14:14') AS timestamp) AS temp_table;
SELECT ts, toDate(ts, 'Asia/Tokyo') AS date_tokyo FROM (SELECT toUnixTimestamp(current_time) AS ts FROM timezone_test) AS nested;
SELECT event_date, toDate(toUnixTimestamp(event_date)) FROM multi_table_test WHERE event_date > '2023-12-01 00:00:00';
